Class Lalafell

java.lang.Object
races.Race
races.Lalafell
public class Lalafell extends Race
Represents the Lalafell race and its specific stat bonuses

  • Method Details

    • randomNameGenerator

      public String randomNameGenerator(Character.Sex sex, HashMap<String,Integer> stats)
      Generates a name randomly, utilizing the sex of the character for everyone, and utilizing stats for Garleans
      Specified by:
      randomNameGenerator in class Race
      Parameters:
      sex - The sex of the character being created
      stats - The stats assigned to the character, used in assigning a Garlean title
      Returns:
      A randomly generated string representing a race-appropriate name

    • pickClan

      public void pickClan(String clan)
      Used to pick a clan, and accepts the race-specific clans as parameter
      Specified by:
      pickClan in class Race
      Parameters:
      clan - The specific clan for the assigned race
